context_text: "Once," began the leader, "we were a free people, living happily in the great forest, flying from tree to tree, eating nuts and fruit, and doing just as we pleased without calling anybody master.

subject: master

context_text: "When I grew up I became a ventriloquist, and at that I was very well trained by a great master.
